title: Perfect Mother's Day Gift | #shorts
full_text: Mom, every Mother's Day is stressful. I never know what to get you. We're all all looking for gifts for our moms. What should we get? You have to give them the gift of being inspired the way you did when you helped me get into comedy. The story of which is in this book, this American woman along with every other story that's going to make women believe that they can take the next step in their words aren't enough. Yes, words. If they're amazing, like my words, which are five star reviews on NetGalley and almost five star reviews on Goodreads, those words are very plenty. I promise you, your mom is going to read this book and feel like she can take that next step no matter what age she is. It's never too late. First of all, it's never too late. Can you tell your friends to tell their moms that it's never too late? So many women are out there thinking that it's just too late for them to do something new. And you and I both know there's no such thing. There are 80-year-old billionaires looking for dates. And guess what? We're just right for it. Well, it's too late for me to be a doctor. So, no.
